title: Public Session + Blog Editor QoL Audit
summary: Focused frontend/admin consistency PR covering public admin affordance session cleanup, contact authored-content fidelity, and BlogEditor quick-save/excerpt workflow improvements.
changed: Removed redundant public layout session fetch and unused Navbar session prop.
Added shared public admin affordance helper in src/lib/auth/public-admin.ts.
Updated public blog, works, contact, introduction, and resume pages to use the shared admin affordance gate.
Changed PublicAdminLink to render from a page-provided canShow boolean.
Removed contact hasMailto/fallback direct-email injection and QA override.
Added BlogEditor top quick-save/back action bar, retained bottom Create/Update submit, and added horizontal workspace resizing.
Preserved excerpt-aware save/update and inline update data flow.
Changed browser default API base to same-origin /api for Docker/CSP-compatible mutations.
Updated focused Vitest and Playwright coverage.
intentionallyNotChanged: Backend auth/security semantics, role checks, session response contract, CSRF behavior, and endpoint routes.
Anonymous accessibility of public read pages.
Excerpt-first blog cards and related cards.
Mobile infinite scroll, feed prefetch redesign, mobile search redesign, broad card density tuning, related-content refactors, and autosave debounce redesign.
Resume PDF DOMMatrix SSR issue, which was diagnosed and deferred.

validations.command: npx vitest run src/test/api-base.test.ts src/test/auth-csrf.test.ts src/test/auth-login-url.test.ts src/test/page-editor.test.tsx src/test/blog-editor.test.tsx src/test/public-admin-rendering.test.tsx --pool=threads

validations.result: passed: Docker dev stack rebuilt and started
completed with 552 passed, 10 failed, 9 skipped; failed lines passed serial rerun

validations.command: serial rerun of failed full-e2e lines with --workers=1

risks: Full e2e is not clean under 4 workers; failures passed serially and indicate parallel shared-state/test isolation risk.
Frontend logs show DOMMatrix is not defined from react-pdf/pdfjs SSR evaluation on /resume; defer to a separate ResumePdfViewer client-only dynamic import fix.
Browser API base now defaults to /api; deployments needing an absolute browser API base should set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL.
Contact pages without authored email links no longer receive synthetic email UI by design.
recommendation: Proceed with this focused PR; follow up on resume PDF SSR DOMMatrix and 4-worker e2e isolation separately.
